name: x265-compress-skill
description: Resumable x265 chunked video encoder with parallel chunks, htop-style pause/resume, source-corruption guard with surgical h264 patching, choke detection, VMAF/PSNR/SSIM scoring, DTS-collision auto-recovery, and a live-reloadable JSON queue runner. Cross-platform (Windows / macOS / Linux) - OS-specific behaviour auto-detected by the platform_compat package.
